since_last: 65% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.33%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.77% · BTC -2.70% · Gold -2.46% · Nasdaq100 +0.70%. 65% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.33%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.33%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +6.29%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +6.29%, ZBRA +3.99%, PUBM +3.65%, PATH +3.59%, RXRX +3.32%. Laggards: SMR -4.51%, OKLO -4.07%, OKLO -4.07%, INOD -2.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.78% at $157.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
